name: Shredded Chicken with Sesame Seeds
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------SAUCE---------------------------
1 ts Dark soy sauce
1 ts Chinese black rice vinegar
-=OR=- Cider vinegar
1/2 ts Sesame oil
1 ts Sugar
2 ts Rice wine or dry sherry
1/2 ts Roasted Sichuan peppercorns
- (optional)
2 ts Finely chopped scallions
1. Cut the chicken breasts into fine shreds, about 3 inches long.
2. Mix the shredded chicken with egg white, salt, and cornstarch in a bowl. Chill for approximately 20 minutes.
3. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet until moderately hot.
4. Add the chilled chicken mixture to the hot oil and stir-fry quickly to prevent sticking.
5. Cook until the chicken turns white, which should take about 1 minute.
6. Drain the chicken immediately using a colander or sieve, removing excess oil.
7. Return the wok to heat and add about 1 tablespoon of the drained oil.
8. Reheat the oil until hot.
9. Add sesame seeds and stir-fry for 1 minute or until lightly browned.
10. Add sauce ingredients (dark soy sauce, Chinese black rice vinegar or cider vinegar, sesame oil, sugar, rice wine or dry sherry, roasted Sichuan peppercorns, finely chopped scallions) to the wok and bring to a boil.
11. Return the cooked chicken to the pan and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes, ensuring thorough coating with the sauce and sesame seeds.
12. Serve immediately or allow to cool before serving at room temperature.
